name: pr-review
description: Reviews pull requests from a PR number or URL by fetching the diff from the current repository, drafting concise inline review comments, surfacing missing tests, risks, best-practice concerns, and author questions without posting anything.

interface.shortDescription: Draft high-signal pull request review comments.
interface.longDescription: Reviews pull requests from a PR number or URL by fetching the diff from the current repository, then drafts concise inline comments, missing-test notes, risk callouts, and author questions without posting anything.
defaultPrompt: Find risks and missing tests in this PR.
